rows.source_ref: neji63, "Sharing my MT4 strategy & set up - Elliot Waves, Fib levels, Support & Resistance, MACD", Babypips forum, 2021, https://forums.babypips.com/t/sharing-my-mt4-strategy-set-up-elliot-waves-fib-levels-support-resistance-macd/528347
rows.strategy_name: Elliott Wave + Fib + MACD discretionary swing
rows.concept: Enter at end of a trend on Elliott wave count 0/2 when a proprietary arrow appears and a restyled-MACD trend indicator confirms direction, with TPs on Fib projections.
rows.eligibility_reason: Discretionary Elliott wave counting plus undefined proprietary 'arrow' / 'JBR trend' indicators (black-box .ex4 shared via Google Drive) with no MACD or Fib parameters disclosed — not deterministically implementable in MQL5.
rows.notes: M15 entry, H1 swing exits. Trend indicator is a 'restyled MACD' (JBR) with no params; later posters report it installs blank / won't run, and ask the author for the MACD figures. TP 'based on Fib projections' unspecified. Secondary suggestion thv-trix-v-6-01 also undefined. No edge left once the black-box indicators are removed.

notes: single REJECTED summary row: discretionary Elliott-wave setup dependent on undefined proprietary indicators; no implementable deterministic rules or parameters
